name: Blue Flame Assault
overview: Li Xicheng joins the fire brigade with dreams of heroism, but quickly learns the tough realities of the job. Under the leadership of Deputy Captain Ye Qiheng, he and his fellow recruits undergo intense training, face life-threatening missions, and grow into a tight-knit team of elite firefighters.

trailers.title: 【蓝焰突击】Blue Flame Assault --- 片头曲：柔软的心筑起铜墙铁壁，坚定的爱隔绝浓烟大火20220416
